name: team
description: 2-person dev team workflow skills: file-or-forge task ledger, identity-aware triage, end-of-session closeout, bidirectional GH/GitLab issue sync. Five commands (hi / task / sync / bye / help). Supports peer mode (equal partners) and boss-employee mode (top-down assignment with boss-friendly GH UI workflow). Config-driven; no hardcoded names.
